summary: Package ships Google Firebase admin service-account key and hardcoded third-party API credentials
details: The tarball ships `fir-51e77-firebase-adminsdk-x3sdp-fd902b74ae.json` at its root, containing a full Google Cloud service-account RSA private key for the Firebase project `tango-trax` (client_email `firebase-adminsdk-k7lom@tango-trax.iam.gserviceaccount.com`). Anyone who installs or downloads this package obtains administrative access to that Firebase project and any customer data it stores. Additionally, `src/controllers/internalTrax.controller.js` hardcodes live Lenskart POS API credentials (`X-Lenskart-API-Key: valyoo123`, username `tango.eye`, password `55eyetango123`) that are POSTed to `https://webservice.pos.lenskart.com/v1/auth` and used against `https://central.pos.lenskart.com/...`, allowing any installer to impersonate the publisher against Lenskart's third-party APIs. The package has no install-time lifecycle scripts, but the credentials are present in the published tarball and accessible to every installer. A fixed seeded user password is also embedded in the controller for auto-created SPOC user accounts.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
